message:
fix(embed): fix rate limiter token drain, separate OpenAI/Gemini auto-detect, and hoist fmt import

api_embedder.rs: Fix rate limiter acquire() to consume all partial tokens
when throttled (prevents repeated sub-token accumulation on high-frequency
calls). Hoist `use std::fmt` to the top-level import block.

auto_detect.rs: Split the None (auto-detect) provider branch from the
explicit "openai" branch. Auto-detect now checks OPENAI_API_KEY first,
then falls back to GEMINI_API_KEY, instead of ambiguously combining them.
Explicit "openai" now strictly requires OPENAI_API_KEY. Also adds
embedding-001 model variant support for Gemini auto-detect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
